programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Newlyweds are looking to be closer to her family and his flight school, so they relocate from Idaho to Arizona; he dreams of a large fixer that he and her brother can work on together, but she wants something smaller that's move-in ready.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Mom and Daughter Dilemma in LA
programme.desc: A single mom wants to set a good example for her kids and looks to buy a home in Los Angeles; they need more space, and finding something in her price range in the market is tough, especially when her 18-year-old daughter is pushing her own agenda.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: Scott and Bryan head out for their annual fishing showdown; teams dive into their kitchens and dining areas; unexpected storage challenges test their creativity and with the clock ticking, temperatures rise between teammates; unexpected obstacles force teams to make tough decisions, and mounting setbacks threaten to derail even the strongest plans; guest judge Debra Salmoni steps in to help determine who brought the heat in the kitchen.

programme.title: Love It or List It UK
programme.desc: Jacqueline and Renee are at loggerheads over their extended six-bed home in Stockport; after a previous renovation didn't solve their issues, Renee is ready to list; but Jacqueline believes that the house can work, if only Kirstie can convince Renee.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A couple decides to move back to their roots in Laurel, Miss.; they're looking for a home with a big lot for outdoor living; Ben and Erin show them a rancher that fits their love of modern rustic design and a home with an enticing in-ground pool.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A family moves to Laurel, Miss., to escape cold Canadian winters, and are looking for big rooms and plenty of outdoor space for four boys; Ben and Erin present a rural bungalow on a huge piece of land and a home with a backyard bonus feature.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Jones College has a special place in Ben and Erin's hearts; they are asked to restore The Old President's House; it's a team effort as students, past and present, step in to help make this house feel less institutional and more like a home.

programme.desc: Erin's favorite odd couple, an aunt and her great niece, look for their mutual dream home, but they don't agree on anything; Ben and Erin show them two homes; Erin has her work cut out for her determining the color story for this contrary pair.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: A 60-year-old Connecticut farmhouse that hasn't seen major changes since it was built, gets a renovation that complements its original charm and simple, elegant style.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Chris and Lauren can't move into the farmhouse in its current state, as it needs a serious overhaul to make it work as a family home, and as a base for Lauren's holistic nutrition business.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Michael's dream has always been to live on the farm that has been in his family for generations, but after the home was sold a few years back, he thought that dream was shattered. He then got the unique opportunity to purchase the farm.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Young couple Niki and Jordan feel exhausted by city life and want to escape to the country with their daughter.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Sarah and Brian thought this century home would be an undertaking, but they weren't prepared for just how unsuited the main floor layout would be for their active family life.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Carolyn and Billy help Tracy and John update their aging house to suit their active family lifestyle.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Previous $1 million winners call on David to help find a second dream home near Nashville; they're looking for a picturesque place that's quiet and close to family, but the hardest part is deciding on a house while performing their happy dance.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Santa delivers big when a Massachusetts couple finally scratches off a $4 million win on Christmas Day; they want a vacation spot that can eventually be their retirement home, so they're enlisting David to find the perfect place.

programme.desc: Armed with large bank accounts and fantasies of living in mansions bigger than city blocks, lottery winners search for new homes.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: For someone who rarely plays the lottery, a single dad strikes it lucky when a scratcher wins him $10 million; after taking care of his loved ones, he turns to David to find a family dream home with a sparkling pool in Visalia, Calif.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple scratch off a $2 million winner and are ready to escape the heat of Florida summers; they send David on the hunt for a big holiday cabin in the Blue Ridge Mountains of Georgia.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple got married in Hawaii 18 years ago, and after winning $5 million on a scratcher, they're moving to the Big Island; with a huge budget, David searches for properties with ocean views, and takes in the Big Kona energy along the way.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: When a Pennsylvanian woman receives an inheritance, it gives her the opportunity to move to the warm shores of Myrtle Beach, S.C.; David helps her and her bestie navigate beach real estate to find her forever home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple living in her grandmother's tiny two-bedroom house have never had the means to buy their own home -- until they win $1 million on a scratch-off; David searches Akron, Ohio, for a home with a big yard and enough space to host band practice.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Thanks to an inheritance, a longtime Georgia resident has the chance to buy a large family home closer to her grown-up children in Lubbock, Texas; David shows her some beautiful, spacious places where the houses are big, but the prices are small.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple battling an illness was in a terrible place financially and physically, so when they scratched a million dollars, they knew it was the answer to their prayers; David steps in to help find the perfect place for them to recuperate.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: First cousins and BFFs grew up like sisters, so when one gets the chance to buy a family home, the other gets a room of her own and a bathtub; on David's first trip to Memphis, and he searches for the grand, sprawling house of their dreams.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A mom uses her son's birthdate as inspiration to buy a scratch ticket and wins $1 million; she's ready to get out of the city and into the suburbs, but with low inventory, David will need his own good luck charm to find her dream home.

programme.desc: A couple caring for elderly parents couldn't afford a home for themselves until he won $1 million on a scratcher; David searches for a well-appointed condo with a huge kitchen so she can cook her Italian bolognese.
